title: A challenge game
wikitext:
[]: A challenge/game             Quote Post by chee » Fri Nov 30, 2007 9:43 pm To those who accept the challenge: Fanwank a convincing theory in favor of Kensuke/Rei. The first one to do so gets to pick another impossible topic for others to fanwank. And so on.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Nov 30, 2007 10:14 pm Do they even speak to each other?

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Nov 30, 2007 10:15 pm Exactly. To accomplish this is to prove one's worth as a fanwanker of the highest order.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Nov 30, 2007 10:25 pm Rei dropped her pencil. She bent over to pick it up. Kensuke just happened to be standing behind her. The rest is history.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Fri Nov 30, 2007 11:26 pm I'll try. Is this what you call fanwanking? The two were lovers when they were Angels, and when they were seperated, their memories were lost to the sands of time. Upon their rendezvous, Adam had recall on the spot and clearly recognized her and tried to turn her on with what he did many many years ago - deep and complicated conversations. What he didn't realize was that Lilith had recall as well and realized that it was Adam, the Angel that she loved, but feigned amnesia and emotion so she wouldn't throw herself on him in the middle of NERV HQ. Disappointed, but not visibly, Adam knows that she will not be able to resist him sooner or later, and continues to carry out what he set out to do. During Adam's advance to Terminal Dogma, Lilith attempted to expand her ATF so that the bridge bunnies' sensors wouldn't detect what she was going to do with him, but she sensed that Magi was very close to discovering who the ATF was coming from, and then shut it down. Adam interpreted this as , and was (not visibly) saddened. When Eva01 grabbed Adam, Lilith was there, just as he predicted, but was (not visibly) surprised when she didn't throw herself onto him and push Eva01 out of the way. It seems as if, during the long absence, she had found another. (not visibly) Greatly saddened, he looks up to smile at his old lover, before moving on to continue his prepared speech, and dies in the hands of Eva01. A few days later, Lilith herself sacrifices herself so that she could be with him in the Angel's Netherworld, interpreted to most as a love for Shinji, and following his decision to end 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Nov 30, 2007 11:33 pm Hmmm...not long ago, I told Brik he won- but that was before encountering TAO's explanation. The results must be re-considered....

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Fri Nov 30, 2007 11:41 pm I didn't know the game was up, you didn't post anything after Brik's comment. My bad.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Nov 30, 2007 11:51 pm It was on the IRC.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sat Dec 01, 2007 12:05 am whats the IRC?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 01, 2007 12:19 am *In Shinji's voice ala Episode 11 when he's getting the Rifle* "Ayanami!" http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3511

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Dec 01, 2007 12:30 am Alright here's how you fanwank using actual "evidence" instead of completely making stuff up. When Shinji asked about Rei, Kensuke was the one who gave him the answer in his whole explanation about how he thought she was "sullen" that must mean that Kensuke has indeed interacted with Rei in the past. Now the second piece of evidence is Reis infatuation with glasses, Kensuke wears glasses, in fact his glasses look an awful lot like Gendos but without the funky tinting. This suggests that symbolically Rei sees Kensuke as a more innocent version of Gendo, the man who she loves. And Kensuke seemed a little too enthusiatstic when he was asking Shinji if he was scoping out Reis body. This suggest that he might have more experience with Reis body then what he lets on. Lastly Aoba saw Rei before he was tanged, Aoba and Kensuke have a lot in common in that both of them like to escape from reality. Kensuke escapes with his military games and obsessions whiule Aoba escapes reality with his air guitar. In another gainax anime flcl guns and guitars are used interchangably. Hideaki Anno had a strong influence in this since he voiced the fat cat who kept beating up Haruko. So it can be assumed that guns and guitars may be used symbolically the same way in evangelion. However the fact that Aoba seemed frightened of Rei means that he and Kensuke who also seems to be a younger version of Aoba are both afraid of getting too close to people. The fact that Rei broke Gendos glasses who due to their orange tinting may be representitive of the at field means that Rei wishes to break down those barriers and get closer to kensuke, her one true love! And that is the mystery of weva solved once and for all!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 01, 2007 12:34 am Defectron is the WINNA IMO.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sat Dec 01, 2007 12:44 am Oh, thats how you fanwank. okayokay.

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Sat Dec 01, 2007 3:41 am I agree. Defectron wins. That was.... wow. :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Dec 01, 2007 4:30 am Defectron, Omedeto!

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Dec 01, 2007 2:38 pm Did I win? Guess I gotta think of something impossible now hmmm... I'll get back to this after work.

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Sat Dec 01, 2007 4:36 pm Defectron, that was fanwanking at its finest.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Dec 01, 2007 4:48 pm Wevangeliwon wrote: Defectron, that was fanwanking at its finest.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sat Dec 01, 2007 5:21 pm May I please know what ‘fanwanking’ is actually about.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat Dec 01, 2007 5:54 pm Defectron wins. Defectron, you pick the next impossible topic.
